title: WA8 0GU, LPW Technology Limited: environmental permit surrender issued - EPR/YP3930JF/S003
body: "The Environment Agency publish surrenders that they issue under the Industrial Emissions Directive (IED).  This decision includes the surrender letter and decision document for:   Operator name: LPW Technology Limited Installation name: LPW Technology Limited Permit number: EPR/YP3930JF/S003  "
